1 Catch table

1.1 No replicated records in Catch data

Data included in the catch table were checked for the presence of duplicated records. The result of the check is here reported:

  • No replicated records in Catch data

Attention: eventual duplicated records will be removed from catch data for the following analysis

1.2 Presence of disaggregated records

Data included in the catch table were checked for the presence of disaggregated records. The result of the check is here reported:

  • No disaggregated records in Catch data

1.3 Check missing years in time series

Data where checked for the continuity of the time series, identifying the presence of missing years:

  • No missing years in the Catch data time series for the selected combination: MUT - ITA - GSA 18

2.6 Kolmogorov-Smirnov test of landings LFDs

The Kolmogorov-Smirnov test provides cumulative length distribution plots by fishery and year. The test is performed on couples of years to assess if their distributions belong to the same population. The table reports only the cases in which the distribution does not belong to the same population in the given comparison.

2.6.1 GSA 18

2.6.1.1 MUT

Plot of cumulative length distributions by fishery and year for MUT - ITA - GSA 18 TableGrob (2 x 3) “arrange”: 5 grobs z cells name grob OTB_NA 1 (1-1,1-1) arrange gtable[layout] OTB_DEF 2 (1-1,2-2) arrange gtable[layout] OTB_MDD 3 (1-1,3-3) arrange gtable[layout] GNS_DEF 4 (2-2,1-1) arrange gtable[layout] GTR_DEF 5 (2-2,2-2) arrange gtable[layout]

3 Discard table

3.1 No replicated records in discard data

Data included in the discard table were checked for the presence of duplicated records. The result of the check is here reported:

  • No replicated records in Discard data

3.2 Presence of disaggregated records

Data included in the discards table were checked for the presence of disaggregated records. The result of the check is here reported:

  • No disaggregated records in discards data

3.3 Check missing years in time series

Discard data where checked for the continuity of the time series, identifying the presence of missing years:

  • The following years are missing in the discards data time series (MUT - ITA - GSA 18): 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008

Plot of discard mean weights for MUT - ITA - GSA 18

3.8 Kolmogorov-Smirnov test

The Kolmogorov-Smirnov test provides cumulative length distribution plots by fishery and year. The test is performed on couples of years to assess if their distributions belong to the same population. The summary table reports only the cases in which the distribution does not belong to the same population in the given comparison.

3.8.1 GSA 18

3.8.1.1 MUT

Plot of cumulative length distributions by fishery and year for MUT - ITA - GSA 18
